response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced engineer with a strong background in the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Java). His explicit experience with AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms, and deep expertise in software testing and TDD make him an exceptional fit for this Senior Fullstack role, easily compensating for the lack of explicit mentions of Nest.js or Vitest.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience using TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack.
Direct, hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP).
Strong advocacy for software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD, and building custom testing tools.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, though extensive Node.js/TypeScript experience mitigates this.
Testing framework experience highlights Selenium and custom tools rather than explicitly Vitest, Jest, or Playwright.
Resume timeline has overlapping dates and older years that may require a quick chronological clarification.
